name: anki-mcp-server
description: Model Context Protocol server for Anki spaced repetition flashcard application
long_description:
Transform your Anki experience with natural language interaction - like having a private tutor. This MCP server enables AI assistants to interact with Anki, allowing them to explain concepts, make learning more engaging, provide context, and adapt to your learning style. Features include review sessions, deck management, note creation and editing, and more.

Requires Anki with the AnkiConnect plugin installed.

tools.name: sync
tools.description: Sync with AnkiWeb to get latest data and push changes

tools.name: get_due_cards
tools.description: Get cards that are due for review, optionally filtered by deck

tools.name: get_cards
tools.description: Get cards with flexible filtering by state (due, new, learning, suspended, buried) and deck

tools.name: present_card
tools.description: Show a card for review with its question/front side

tools.name: rate_card
tools.description: Rate card performance (Again, Hard, Good, Easy) and schedule next review

tools.name: addNote
tools.description: Create new notes with specified fields and tags. IMPORTANT: Only create notes that were explicitly requested by the user

tools.name: addNotes
tools.description: Add multiple notes to Anki in a single batch. Up to 100 notes sharing the same deck and model. Supports partial success - individual failures don't affect others.

tools.name: findNotes
tools.description: Search for notes using Anki query syntax (deck:, tag:, is:due, etc.)

tools.name: notesInfo
tools.description: Get detailed information about notes including fields, tags, and CSS styling

tools.name: updateNoteFields
tools.description: Update existing note fields with support for HTML content. IMPORTANT: Only update notes that the user explicitly asked to modify

tools.name: deleteNotes
tools.description: Delete notes and all associated cards. CRITICAL: This is destructive and permanent - only delete notes the user explicitly confirmed for deletion

tools.name: modelNames
tools.description: List all available note types/models

tools.name: modelFieldNames
tools.description: Get field names for a specific note type

tools.name: getTags
tools.description: Get all tags in the Anki collection. Helps discover existing tags before creating notes to prevent duplication

tools.name: modelStyling
tools.description: Get CSS styling information for a note type

tools.name: createModel
tools.description: Create a new note type (model) with custom fields, card templates, and CSS styling. Useful for creating specialized models like RTL (Right-to-Left) language models for Hebrew, Arabic, etc.

tools.name: updateModelStyling
tools.description: Update the CSS styling for an existing note type. Changes apply to all cards using this model. Useful for adding RTL support or modifying appearance.

tools.name: guiBrowse
tools.description: Open Anki Card Browser and search for cards. For note editing/creation workflows only, NOT for review sessions

tools.name: guiSelectCard
tools.description: Select a specific card in the Card Browser. For note editing/creation workflows only

tools.name: guiSelectedNotes
tools.description: Get IDs of notes currently selected in Card Browser. For note editing/creation workflows only

tools.name: guiAddCards
tools.description: Open Add Cards dialog with preset note details. For note editing/creation workflows only

tools.name: guiEditNote
tools.description: Open note editor for a specific note. For note editing/creation workflows only

tools.name: guiDeckOverview
tools.description: Open Deck Overview dialog for a specific deck. For deck management workflows only

tools.name: guiDeckBrowser
tools.description: Open Deck Browser dialog. For deck management workflows only

tools.name: guiCurrentCard
tools.description: Get current card info in review mode. For note editing/creation workflows only, NOT for review sessions

tools.name: guiShowQuestion
tools.description: Show question side of current card. For note editing/creation workflows only, NOT for review sessions

tools.name: guiShowAnswer
tools.description: Show answer side of current card. For note editing/creation workflows only, NOT for review sessions

tools.name: guiUndo
tools.description: Undo the last action in Anki. For note editing/creation workflows only

tools.name: listDecks
tools.description: List all Anki decks, optionally with card count statistics for each deck

tools.name: deckStats
tools.description: Get comprehensive statistics for a single deck including card counts, ease and interval distributions

tools.name: createDeck
tools.description: Create a new empty Anki deck. Supports parent::child structure (max 2 levels, e.g., "Japanese::JLPT N5")

tools.name: changeDeck
tools.description: Move cards to a different deck. Target deck will be created if it doesn't exist

tools.name: retrieveMediaFile
tools.description: Download a media file from Anki's collection.media folder as base64 content

tools.name: getMediaFilesNames
tools.description: List media files in Anki's collection.media folder, optionally filtered by pattern

tools.name: storeMediaFile
tools.description: Upload a media file to Anki from base64 data, an absolute file path, or a URL. Perfect for workflows like ElevenLabs TTS → Anki audio flashcards

tools.name: deleteMediaFile
tools.description: Remove a media file from Anki's collection.media folder. CRITICAL: This is destructive and permanent - only delete media the user explicitly confirmed for deletion

tools.name: addTags
tools.description: Add space-separated tags to specified notes. Use getTags first to discover existing tags and prevent duplication

tools.name: removeTags
tools.description: Remove space-separated tags from specified notes

tools.name: replaceTags
tools.description: Rename a tag across specified notes (e.g., "RomanEmpire" → "roman-empire")

tools.name: clearUnusedTags
tools.description: Remove orphaned tags that are not used by any notes in the collection. CRITICAL: This is destructive and permanent - only run when the user explicitly asks to clean up tags

tools.name: collection_stats
tools.description: Get aggregated statistics across all decks in the collection with per-deck breakdown

tools.name: review_stats
tools.description: Get review history analysis including temporal patterns, retention metrics, and study streak information

prompts.name: anki_review
prompts.description: Guided Anki review session workflow with spaced repetition best practices
prompts.text: Guidelines for conducting Anki spaced repetition review sessions. Covers sync workflow, card presentation, rating criteria, and session management.

prompts.name: twenty_rules
prompts.description: Twenty rules of formulating knowledge for effective Anki flashcard creation
prompts.text: Twenty rules of formulating knowledge by Dr. Piotr Wozniak, adapted for effective Anki flashcard creation.

anki_connect_url.title: AnkiConnect URL
anki_connect_url.description: URL of the AnkiConnect server (default: http://localhost:8765)

anki_connect_api_key.title: AnkiConnect API Key
anki_connect_api_key.description: Optional API key if configured in AnkiConnect
